rationale: No events this cycle directly affect Portugal; EU defense autonomy debate and energy stalemate continue as background noise with no new developments.

top_events.title: France-Germany FCAS collapse: European defense autonomy at risk
top_events.summary: The Franco-German fighter jet program collapse continues as a story about EU strategic independence. For Portugal, this is a distant but relevant EU-level defense debate with no immediate daily impact.

top_events.title: Iran-US deal stalemate; energy prices unchanged
top_events.summary: No breakthrough in Iran nuclear talks means no relief on global energy prices. Portuguese consumers continue to face elevated costs but no new shock this cycle.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands to highlight migrant journeys
top_events.summary: The Pope's visit to the Canary Islands draws attention to Atlantic migration routes — a topic with some relevance to Portugal given shared Atlantic geography and migration pressures.
